import Aside from '/src/components/Alert.tsx';
import RN from '/src/components/ReleaseNote.astro';

## v7.0
<RN type="feature" breaking>New ASP.NET project template (`shinyaspnet`) ‚Äî API + service host with Shiny Mediator endpoints, JWT bearer auth with refresh tokens, Orleans (clustering, reminders, persistence, streams, dashboard), SignalR sample hub, Scalar OpenAPI UI, and optional Google / Facebook / Apple social auth</RN>
<RN type="feature" breaking>New Blazor WebAssembly template (`shinyblazor`) ‚Äî standalone WASM client with optional MudBlazor / Radzen / Microsoft FluentUI, Shiny Mediator (with Blazor extensions), Shiny Blazor Controls, IndexedDB document store, Web Bluetooth, browser geolocation, web push, Web Speech, and AI Conversation</RN>
<RN type="feature">Per-platform target toggles for MAUI ‚Äî `useios`, `useandroid`, `usemaccatalyst`, `usewindows` let you scope the TFM list (and skip the matching `Platforms/{platform}/` folder) without hand-editing the csproj</RN>
<RN type="feature">DocumentDb provider choice for both MAUI and ASP.NET ‚Äî pick from SQLite, SQLite (SqlCipher), SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Cosmos DB, MongoDB, LiteDB, DuckDB (server) or IndexedDB (browser); registration is wired in `Program.cs` / `MauiProgram.cs` with sensible defaults and TODO callouts where credentials are needed</RN>
<RN type="feature">AI options across the Shiny stack ‚Äî `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`, Shiny Mediator AI Tools (`aimediator`), Shell AI Tools (`aishinyshell`), DocumentDB AI Tools (`aidocumentdb`), and Shiny AI Conversation with auto-wired Speech support</RN>
<RN type="feature">Speech & Audio ‚Äî Shiny.Speech 2.1 STT/TTS plus audio source and audio player registration; available in MAUI (native APIs) and Blazor (Web Speech API)</RN>
<RN type="feature">Shiny.Maui.Controls suite ‚Äî Scheduler (Calendar/Agenda/Events), BottomSheet, ImageViewer (pinch/pan/zoom), PillView status badges, SecurityPin, Fab / FabMenu, plus add-on packs for Markdown (view + editor), Mermaid Diagrams (no WebView), Barcodes & QR Codes (managed renderer), and the new Desktop pack (Tray Icon, VS-style window Docking, touch/kiosk on-screen keyboard for Windows/macOS/MacCatalyst/Linux)</RN>
<RN type="feature">Shiny.Blazor.Controls suite ‚Äî same control library for Blazor with Markdown, Mermaid Diagrams, Barcodes, and a Kiosk pack for touch on-screen keyboard and docking in WASM</RN>
<RN type="feature">Geospatial DB (`Shiny.Spatial`) and Geofencing extension wired for MAUI ‚Äî dependency-free, AOT-friendly R*Tree-backed store</RN>
<RN type="feature">Contact Store (`Shiny.Maui.ContactStore`) ‚Äî cross-platform device contact CRUD with MAUI permissions</RN>
<RN type="feature">Background HTTP Transfers and Bidirectional JSON Sync (`Shiny.Data.Sync`) toggles for MAUI</RN>
<RN type="feature">MAUI DevFlow integration ‚Äî debug-only visual tree / profiling / network monitor / AI agent toolkit, wired in `MauiProgram.cs` and scoped to `Configuration == Debug`</RN>
<RN type="enhancement" breaking>Target framework moved to `.NET 10` (`net10.0`) across MAUI, ASP.NET, and Blazor templates; existing MAUI projects must add `&lt;TargetFrameworks&gt;` for `-android`/`-ios`/`-maccatalyst`/`-windows10.0.19041.0` to match the new platform-target bools</RN>
<RN type="enhancement" breaking>MAUI csproj now uses per-train version variables ‚Äî `ShinyVersion` (client packages), `ShinyControlsVersion`, `ShinyShellVersion`, `ShinyDocumentDbVersion`, `ShinyMauiHostingVersion`, `MediatorVersion`. Replace your local `$(ShinyVersion)` references if you forked the csproj.</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Bumped to Shiny Client `5.0.0-beta-0135`, Shiny Controls `1.0.1-beta-0102`, Shiny MAUI Shell `6.2.0`, Shiny Mediator `6.6.1`, Shiny.DocumentDb `6.1.0`, Shiny.Speech `2.1.0`, Shiny.AiConversation `1.0.0-beta-0050`, MudBlazor `9.5.0`, Radzen.Blazor `10.4.7`, Microsoft.FluentUI `4.14.2`, Microsoft.Extensions.AI `10.7.0`, Scalar `2.16.2`</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Auth handlers (`Handlers/Auth/*`) automatically force Shiny Mediator on when JWT auth is enabled ‚Äî no more silent breakage when you turn mediator off and leave auth on</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Three new built-in template builders on the docs site ‚Äî pick options visually for MAUI, ASP.NET, or Blazor WASM and download the project, identical to `dotnet new shiny{kind}`</RN>
<RN type="chore">Removed the Speech Recognition standalone template (folded into Shiny.Speech)</RN>
<RN type="chore">Switched stores to `[Bind]` attribute-based persistence ‚Äî see [Shiny Stores](/extensions/stores/) for the new pattern</RN>

## v5.0
<RN type="feature">Add Shiny Health integration ‚Äî cross-platform health data access for HealthKit (iOS) and Health Connect (Android) with full permissions and entitlements setup</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Update Shiny.Maui.Shell and Shiny.Maui.Shell.UxDiversDialogs to v5.0.0</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Update all 3rd party libraries to their latest versions</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Remove dead packages or those that are not AOT compliant</RN>

## v4.0
<RN type="enhancement">Reorganize all 3rd party libraries and place category in front of each to improve clarity and ensure it is nicely organized on Visual Studio</RN>
<RN type="enhancement">Remove old libraries that haven't been receiving updates</RN>
